name: Bug Fix
description: Structured workflow for investigating, diagnosing, and fixing bugs with root cause analysis and verification

steps.title: Read project rules and conventions
steps.description: Load and review project-level rule files and conventions relevant to debugging and fixing

steps.title: Understand the error
steps.description: Analyze the error message, stack trace, or unexpected behavior to understand what is going wrong
steps.expectedResult: Error understood with reproduction steps documented
acceptanceCriteria: Error analysis document exists with reproduction steps

steps.title: Inspect relevant code
steps.description: Examine the code related to the error, trace execution paths, and understand the context using CodeGraph if available
steps.expectedResult: Relevant code areas examined and documented
acceptanceCriteria: Relevant code areas are documented with code paths
steps.finalOutputContribution: Identifies the area where the bug lives

steps.title: Identify root cause
steps.description: Find the root cause of the issue through analysis, investigation, and tracing
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause is identified with supporting evidence
steps.finalOutputContribution: Defines exactly what needs to be fixed

steps.title: Implement the fix
steps.description: Apply the fix for the identified root cause following project conventions
steps.expectedResult: Fix applied to the correct files
acceptanceCriteria: Fix changes are applied to relevant files

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Run tests and validation to confirm the fix works and no regressions were introduced
steps.expectedResult: Tests and validation pass after the fix

steps.title: Generate debugging report
steps.description: Document root cause, fix applied, and verification results for future reference
steps.inputContext: Root cause analysis, fix details, verification results
steps.expectedResult: Debugging report with root cause and fix details
acceptanceCriteria: Debug report exists with root cause and fix
